name: swarnil
description: Swarnil — a monochrome, pattern-rich personal OS for Ghost. Videos, blog, projects, courses, webseries, timeline, changelog, resume & more. Built with Tailwind CSS, PWA-ready, JSON-LD everywhere.

scripts.zip: npm run build && npm run test:fatal && mkdir -p dist && zip -r -X dist/swarnil.zip . -x 'node_modules/*' 'dist/*' '.git/*' '.github/*' '.claude/*' 'data.json' 'import.json' 'theme-customize.txt' 'instruction.md' 'documentation.md' 'redirects.yaml' '*.map' '.DS_Store' '.gitignore'
scripts.release: npm run zip && echo '→ dist/swarnil.zip ready to upload (Ghost Admin → Design → Change theme → Upload)'

color_scheme.description: Default theme mode. Visitors can still switch.

enable_adsense.description: Show Google AdSense ads across the site

youtube_url.description: YouTube channel URL for subscribe CTAs

topmate_url.description: Topmate scheduling link shown on contact page

job_title.description: Shown in the hero and footer

workplace.description: Company name shown in the hero

github_repo.description: user/repo for the GitHub star button in the navbar

hero_video_url.description: Optional mp4/webm shown in the hero media stack

hero_image.description: Portrait / photo used in the hero media stack

hero_image_alt.description: Second photo used in the hero media stack

adsense_publisher_id.description: AdSense publisher ID. Empty = styled placeholders instead of ads.

newsletter_title.default: The Signal — my letters on marketing, code & craft

footer_tagline.default: Framing the color 1:1, cropping out the noise.

sponsor_email.description: Contact email shown on the sponsor page

onesignal_app_id.description: OneSignal App ID — enables web push notifications via the theme service worker. Empty = push off.
